scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dirs=['.next','node_modules/.cache']; const wait=(ms)=>Atomics.wait(new Int32Array(new SharedArrayBuffer(4)),0,0,ms); for (const dir of dirs){ if(!fs.existsSync(dir)) continue; let removed=false; for(let attempt=0; attempt<5 && !removed; attempt+=1){ try{ fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true,maxRetries:5,retryDelay:120}); removed=true; console.log('removed',dir); } catch(err){ if(attempt===4) throw err; wait(180); } } }"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
